modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Email delivery receipts not received for some recipients in Outlook.

full_description_text:  
I sent an email to many people and asked for delivery receipts. But I did not get receipts for some of them, and I want to know if they received the email. It is important for me to verify if the message was delivered correctly.
short_description: Email delivery receipts not received for some recipients in Outlook.
description: I sent an email to many people and asked for delivery receipts. But I did not get receipts for some of them, and I want to know if they received the email. It is important for me to verify if the message was delivered correctly.
